title: calamus helferianus
intro: Calamus helferianus, also known as the Valsan or Indian calamus, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of calamus helferianus include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. In herbal preparations, calamus helferianus is often used as a root extract or essential oil, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
